name: Lamball
description: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

name: Cattiva
description: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by {Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Chikipi
description: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

name: Lifmunk
description: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Fuack Ignis
description: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Vixy
description: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.

name: Celaray
description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding. {ReferenceMsgId_GriderPerformanceUp}

name: Celaray Lux
description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding. {ReferenceMsgId_GriderPerformanceUp}

name: Cremis
description: While in party, increases Attack of [ICON:ElemIcon_Neutral][ELEM:Normal] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

name: Croajiro
description: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Croajiro Noct
description: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] damage to enemy weak points by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Herbil
description: While in party, Herbil uses its healing powers to restore {ActiveSkillMainValueByRank}% of the player's Hp2 when incapacitated. {ReferenceMsgId_CooldownReduction}

name: Teafant
description: While in party, restores {Passive1_EffectValue1}% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack) ({ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}-second cooldown after activation)

name: Gumoss
description: While in party, improves logging efficiency by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% and reduces weight of all types of wood by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Pupperai
description: While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Clovee
description: While at a base, increases the Collection Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Jolthog
description: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] explosion upon impact. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Jolthog Cryst
description: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] explosion upon impact. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Depresso
description: When activated, Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.

name: Pengullet
description: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Pengullet Lux
description: When activated, the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Penking
description: While in party, [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Penking Lux
description: While in party, improves player's and Pals' [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] damage to enemy weak points by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Hoocrates
description: While in party, increases Attack of [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Melpaca
description: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Kingpaca's Defense and Movement Speed. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

name: Kingpaca
description: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each Melpaca in party.

name: Daedream
description: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] magic bullets. These bullets will not reduce the target's Health below 1. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Tanzee
description: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Tanzee Ignis
description: When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Nox
description: When activated, detects the location of nearby Pal Effigies. {ReferenceMsgId_SearchAreaCoolTime}

name: Flambelle
description: While in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% per second outside of combat. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Rooby
description: While in party, increases Defense of [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Mau
description: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to Ranch.

name: Mau Cryst
description: Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Rushoar
description: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases efficiency of destroying Stone by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Foxparks
description: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Foxparks Cryst
description: When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Killamari
description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time. {ReferenceMsgId_GriderPerformanceUp}

name: Killamari Primo
description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time. {ReferenceMsgId_GriderPerformanceUp}

name: Fuddler
description: While in party, improves player mining efficiency by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% and reduces Stone weight by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Eikthyrdeer
description: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted and increases lumbering efficiency by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Eikthyrdeer Terra
description: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While at a base, increases the Deforest Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1} (Does not stack)

name: Direhowl
description: Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts. {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Caprity
description: Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores {Passive1_EffectValue1} Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

name: Caprity Noct
description: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores {Passive1_EffectValue1} Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

name: Swee
description: While in party, increases Attack and Defense of Sweepa.

name: Sweepa
description: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each Swee in party.

name: Turtacle
description: While in party, reduces Ore weight by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Turtacle Terra
description: While in party, reduces weight of Sulfur and Coal by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. Also improves player's and Pals' [ICON:ElemIcon_Ground][ELEM:Earth] damage to enemy weak points by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Woolipop
description: Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Woolipop Terra
description: Sometimes drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Azurobe
description: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. {ReferenceMsgId_SwimSpeedUp}

name: Azurobe Cryst
description: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. {ReferenceMsgId_SwimSpeedUp}

name: Sparkit
description: While in party, increases Attack of [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Electric Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Kelpsea
description: While in party, increases Attack of [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Aquatic Pal Fluids when assigned to Ranch.

name: Kelpsea Ignis
description: While in party, increases Attack of [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Ribbuny
description: While in party, increases Attack of [ICON:ElemIcon_Neutral][ELEM:Normal] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) While at a base, increases the Handcraft Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive2_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Ribbuny Botan
description: While in party, improves player's and Pals' [ICON:ElemIcon_Grass][ELEM:Leaf] damage to enemy weak points by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) Increases efficiency by {Passive2_EffectValue1}% when working at a Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, or other related facilities.

name: Jelliette
description: While in party, increases items obtained from fishing by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jelliette's watering speed increases by {Passive3_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Jellroy
description: While in party, increases items obtained from salvaging by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy's watering speed increases by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Amione
description: While at a base, increases the Watering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Gloopie Primo
description: While in party, increases Defense of [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Galeclaw
description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand. {ReferenceMsgId_GriderPerformanceUp}

name: Wispaw
description: While in party, increases the capture rate when awarded a back bonus. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_CaptureRate}

name: Nitewing
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Tombat
description: When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to detect nearby dungeons, treasure chests, and scrap. {ReferenceMsgId_SearchAreaCoolTime}

name: Tocotoco
description: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into an egg launcher. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Univolt
description: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] damage to weak points by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Gobfin
description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Aqua Gun. When this Pal uses Aqua Gun, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Gobfin Ignis
description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Spirit Fire. When this Pal uses Spirit Fire, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Loupmoon
description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Jumping Claw. When this Pal uses Jumping Claw, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Loupmoon Cryst
description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Snow Claw. When this Pal uses Snow Claw, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Cawgnito
description: When activated, grants Night Vision to see in dark places. Activate again to turn off. Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

name: Arsox
description: Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Cold Resistance +2. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Muffly
description: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with [EFFECT:Freeze]. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_CaptureRate}

name: Bristla
description: While in party, increases Attack of [ICON:ElemIcon_Grass][ELEM:Leaf] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Cinnamoth
description: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Poison Fog. While at a base, increases the Monster Farm Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Puffolt
description: While at a base, increases the Generate Electricity Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Elphidran
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Elphidran Aqua
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, player and party Pals take {Passive1_EffectValue1}% less [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] damage and are immune to [EFFECT:Burn]. (Does not stack)

name: Vanwyrm
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Vanwyrm Cryst
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Felbat
description: While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat a life steal effect that restores {Passive1_EffectValue1}% of damage dealt as Hp.

name: Vaelet
description: While in party, [ICON:ElemIcon_Ground][ELEM:Earth] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops various seeds when assigned to Ranch.

name: Beegarde
description: While in party, increases Elizabee's Attack. Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch.

name: Elizabee
description: This Pal's Attack increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each Beegarde in party.

name: Lovander
description: While fighting together, grants the player and Lovander a life steal effect that restores {Passive1_EffectValue1}% of damage dealt as Hp.

name: Grintale
description: Can be ridden. While in party, picking up a Pal Egg has a {Passive1_EffectValue1}% chance of receiving one extra. (Does not stack)

name: Tarantriss
description: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. Additionally, can shoot spider web to grapple and move at high speed. {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Polapup
description: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes.

name: Polapup Terra
description: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes. While it starts out slow, the top speed it can hit while sliding is no joke.

name: Leezpunk
description: When activated, Leezpunk and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for {ActiveSkillOverWriteEffectTime} seconds. {ReferenceMsgId_CooldownReduction}

name: Leezpunk Ignis
description: When activated, Leezpunk Ignis and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for {ActiveSkillOverWriteEffectTime} seconds. {ReferenceMsgId_CooldownReduction}

name: Gorirat
description: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat's Attack by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}% for a limited time.

name: Gorirat Terra
description: While in party, increases the player's climbing speed by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Surfent
description: Can be ridden to travel on water. Sometimes drops Leather when assigned to Ranch. {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Surfent Terra
description: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict [EFFECT:Muddy] {Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Robinquill
description: While in party, increases the player's bow damage by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Robinquill Terra
description: While in party, increases the player's bow charge speed by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Flopie
description: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items. {ReferenceMsgId_ItemCollectRangeUp}

name: Wixen
description: When activated, Wixen changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] and increases Attack by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Wixen Noct
description: When activated, Wixen Noct changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] and increases Attack by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Katress
description: While in party, [ICON:ElemIcon_Neutral][ELEM:Normal] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. Also has a {Passive2_EffectValue1}% chance to prevent Pal Sphere consumption when thrown. (Does not stack)

name: Katress Ignis
description: While at a base, increases the Emit Flame Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Helzephyr
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Helzephyr Lux
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Elgrove
description: When activated, Elgrove changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Grass][ELEM:Leaf] and increases Attack by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Elgrove Cryst
description: While in party, grants the player the ability to [EFFECT:Freeze] enemies afflicted with [EFFECT:Wetness] in one strike.

name: Lunaris
description: While in party, spheres home in on Pals, and carrying capacity increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Fenglope
description: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Fenglope Lux
description: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. While in party, [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Dinossom
description: Can be ridden. While in party, increase Defense of [ICON:ElemIcon_Dragon][ELEM:Dragon] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Dinossom Lux
description: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Defense of [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Bushi
description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier.

name: Bushi Noct
description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% but only when not in combat. (Does not stack)

name: Munchill
description: While in party, reduces the weight of ingredient and food by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. When paired with another [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] Pal, their Rot Speed also reduces by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Mammorest
description: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% and mining efficiency by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Mammorest Cryst
description: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% and mining efficiency by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Finsider
description: When activated, Finsider changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] and increases Attack by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Finsider Ignis
description: While in party, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, reducing the weight of weapons in your inventory by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. Also improves player's and Pals' [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] damage to enemy weak points by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Petallia
description: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by {ActiveSkillMainValueByRank}%. While at a base, increases the Seeding Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Petallia Ignis
description: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by {ActiveSkillMainValueByRank}%. While in party, player and party Pals take {Passive1_EffectValue1}% less [ICON:ElemIcon_Grass][ELEM:Leaf] damage, and are immune to [EFFECT:IvyCling]. (Does not stack)

name: Leafan
description: This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Grass][ELEM:Leaf] Pal in your party.

name: Incineram
description: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Hellfire Claw. When this Pal uses Hellfire Claw, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier.

name: Incineram Noct
description: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Nightmare Claw. When this Pal uses Nightmare Claw, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier.

name: Dazzi
description: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1. {ReferenceMsgId_Funnel}

name: Dazzi Noct
description: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1. {ReferenceMsgId_Funnel}

name: Pyrin
description: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Pyrin Noct
description: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to[ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Relaxaurus
description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Relaxaurus Lux
description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Foxcicle
description: While in party, increases Attack of [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Beakon
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] and increases Attack by {Passive3_EffectValue1}%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon)

name: Beakon Cryst
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] and increases Attack by {Passive3_EffectValue1}%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon Cryst)

name: Ghangler
description: Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] or [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler)

name: Ghangler Ignis
description: Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] or [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler Ignis)

name: Rayhound
description: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] Pal in your party. (Excluding Rayhound)

name: Rayhound Cryst
description: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While in party, increases Defense of [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Menasting
description: While in party, player's Defense increases by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%, and [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Menasting Terra
description: While in party, player's Defense increases by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%, and [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Needoll
description: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with [EFFECT:IvyCling] by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Needoll Noct
description: While in party, the player's attacks inflict [EFFECT:IvyCling] {Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Reindrix
description: Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Heat Resistance +2. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Mossanda
description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Mossanda Lux
description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Chillet
description: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Dragon][ELEM:Dragon] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Chillet Ignis
description: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Ragnahawk
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Moldron
description: Can be ridden as a mount. This Pal's Attack increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] or [ICON:ElemIcon_Ground][ELEM:Earth] Pal in your party.

name: Moldron Cryst
description: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] damage to enemy weak points by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Palumba
description: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% while mounted on grass.

name: Digtoise
description: When activated, enters the Shell Spin state. Follows the player while spinning, increasing ore mining efficiency by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Broncherry
description: Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a {Passive1_EffectValue1}% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

name: Broncherry Aqua
description: Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a {Passive1_EffectValue1}% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

name: Dumud
description: While in party, increases Attack of [ICON:ElemIcon_Ground][ELEM:Earth] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch.

name: Dumud Gild
description: While in party, increases amount of Gold Coin dropped by enemies by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}%. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch, with a small chance to drop Gold Coin. (Does not stack)

name: Braloha
description: Can be ridden. While in your base, increases the egg production speed of Pals assigned to Breeding Farm by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Kitsun
description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take {Passive1_EffectValue1}% less [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] damage and are immune to [EFFECT:Freeze]. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Kitsun Noct
description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take {Passive1_EffectValue1}% less [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] damage and are immune to [EFFECT:Darkness]. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Blazehowl
description: Can be ridden. While in party, [ICON:ElemIcon_Grass][ELEM:Leaf] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Blazehowl Noct
description: Can be ridden. While in party, [ICON:ElemIcon_Neutral][ELEM:Normal] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Warsect
description: While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within {Passive1_EffectValue1} seconds. (Does not stack)

name: Warsect Terra
description: While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within {Passive1_EffectValue1} seconds. (Does not stack)

name: Frostplume
description: While in party, Frostplume's icy aura sharpens focus, increasing the player's reload speeds by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Majex
description: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with [EFFECT:Burn], the enemy creates flames around itself, dealing continuous damage equal to {Passive1_EffectValue1}% of the player's attack damage to enemies that come into contact with them. (Does not stack.)

name: Sibelyx
description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Blizzard Spike. When this Pal uses Blizzard Spike, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier. Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

name: Sibelyx Primo
description: While in party, increases Defense of [ICON:ElemIcon_Neutral][ELEM:Normal] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

name: Maraith
description: Can be ridden. While in party, all Party Pals' Active Skill cooldowns are reduced by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% whenever you defeat an enemy. (Does not stack)

name: Shroomer
description: Can be ridden. Sometimes drops Mushroom or Cavern Mushroom when assigned to Ranch.

name: Shroomer Noct
description: Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases by {Passive1_EffectValue2}%.

name: Icelyn
description: When activated, Icelyn changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] and increases Attack by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Gildra
description: While fighting together, when Gildra is incapacitated, it revives with its Hunger reduced to 0. {ReferenceMsgId_CooldownReduction}

name: Jormuntide
description: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with [EFFECT:Wetness] by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Jormuntide Ignis
description: Can be ridden. While in party, nullifies lava damage and increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with [EFFECT:Burn] by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Suzaku
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku)

name: Suzaku Aqua
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku Aqua)

name: Dazemu
description: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% while mounted on sand.

name: Quivern
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases Attack of [ICON:ElemIcon_Dragon][ELEM:Dragon] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Quivern Botan
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Grass][ELEM:Leaf] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Lullu
description: While at a base, Lullu fills farms with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of the crops by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Kikit
description: While in party, increases Defense of [ICON:ElemIcon_Ground][ELEM:Earth] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Yakumo
description: Can be ridden. While fighting together, {Passive1_EffectValue1}% increased chance of encountering pals with the same Passive Skill as this Pal. (Excludes certain Passive Skills)

name: Reptyro Cryst
description: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Starryon
description: Can be ridden. Boosts jumping ability while mounted. This Pal's movement speed increases by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}% at night.

name: Starryon Primo
description: Can be ridden. Boosts Jump Power while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Neutral][ELEM:Normal] Pal in your party. (Excluding Starryon Primo)

name: Pierdon
description: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with [EFFECT:Muddy] by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Pierdon Cryst
description: While in party, player and party Pals take {Passive1_EffectValue1}% less [ICON:ElemIcon_Dragon][ELEM:Dragon] damage. (Does not stack)

name: Cryolinx
description: While in party, [ICON:ElemIcon_Dragon][ELEM:Dragon] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Cryolinx Terra
description: While in party, when attacking enemy weak point, increases the power of the next weak point attack by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Snugloo
description: While in party, reduces the chance of being detected by enemies. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_EnemySightRate}

name: Wumpo
description: Can be ridden. While at a base, increases the Transport Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Wumpo Botan
description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take {Passive1_EffectValue1}% less [ICON:ElemIcon_Ground][ELEM:Earth] damage and are immune to [EFFECT:Muddy] status. (Does not stack)

name: Sootseer
description: While in party, player and party Pals take {Passive1_EffectValue1}% less [ICON:ElemIcon_Neutral][ELEM:Normal] damage. (Does not stack) Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

name: Carnibora
description: While in party, when the player performs a dodge roll or dodge step, Carnibora creates a whirlwind that deals damage to enemies it touches ([ICON:ElemIcon_Grass][ELEM:Leaf] / Power: {Passive1_EffectValue1}). (Does not stack)

name: Blazamut
description: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% whenever you defeat an enemy. This effect lasts 20 seconds and stacks up to five times.

name: Blazamut Ryu
description: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' [ICON:ElemIcon_Dragon][ELEM:Dragon] damage to enemy weak points by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Dualith
description: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith fires a powerful [ICON:ElemIcon_Grass][ELEM:Leaf] laser from its right hand. {ReferenceMsgId_CooldownReduction}

name: Dualith Noct
description: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith Noct fires a powerful [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] laser from its right hand. {ReferenceMsgId_CooldownReduction}

name: Anubis
description: When activated, Anubis changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Ground][ELEM:Earth] and increases Attack by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}%. Occasionally evades attacks with a flash sidestep during battle.

name: Sekhmet
description: While at base, boosts Anubis's work speed by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. Increases efficiency by {Passive2_EffectValue1}% if Sekhmet is also working at a Workbench, Workshop, or other related facilities. (Does not stack)

name: Prixter
description: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with [EFFECT:Poison] by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Prixter Lux
description: When activated, Prixter Lux changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] and increases Attack by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Tetroise
description: Can be ridden While at a base, increases the Mining Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Tetroise Primo
description: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the durability of all weapons and armor by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Mimog
description: While fighting together, Mimog can open treasure chests without using a key. {ReferenceMsgId_CooldownReduction}

name: Xenovader
description: While in party, increases the damage of the last bullet fired from a full-auto weapon by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Xenogard
description: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the player's energy weapon damage by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Prunelia
description: While at a base, Prunelia's prayers bless the crops, increasing their harvest by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Nitemary
description: While fighting together, Pals drop +{Passive1_EffectValue1}% more Pal Souls when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Nitemary Botan
description: While in party, increases Defense of [ICON:ElemIcon_Grass][ELEM:Leaf] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Smokie
description: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, Chromite acquisition increases by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Smokie Cryst
description: While at a base, increases the Cool Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Omascul
description: While in party, increases Party Pals' EXP gained by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Whalaska
description: Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigames start with the capture gauge increased by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. Additionally, while the bars overlap, capture progress increases by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_SwimSpeedUp}

name: Whalaska Ignis
description: Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigame begins with the capture gauge {Passive1_EffectValue1}% higher than usual, and capture progress increases by {Passive2_EffectValue1}% while the bars overlap. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_SwimSpeedUp}

name: Verdash
description: While in party, grants {Passive1_EffectValue1} additional jump and {Passive1_EffectValue2} additional mid-air dash. (Does not stack)

name: Splatterina
description: While in party, the amount of items obtained from using the Meat Cleaver increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Gildane
description: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Ground][ELEM:Earth] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Dogen
description: When activated, teleports to the nearest base. Cannot be used inside dungeons or similar areas. {ReferenceMsgId_CooldownReduction}

name: Bulldosu
description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take {Passive1_EffectValue1}% less [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] damage and are immune to [EFFECT:Electrical]. (Does not stack)

name: Celesdir
description: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increases by {Passive2_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Neutral][ELEM:Normal] Pal in your party. When in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% per second. (Does not stack)

name: Celesdir Noct
description: Can be ridden. While in party, the Pal fighting alongside you gradually loses Health in exchange for {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}% Attack increase. (Does not stack)

name: Astegon
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases the damage dealt to ores by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%, and you can obtain {Passive2_EffectValue1}% more Ore while mounted.

name: Knocklem
description: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem's Attack by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}% and Defense by {ReferencePassive2_EffectValue1}% for a limited time.

name: Knocklem Ignis
description: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem Ignis's Attack by {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}% and Defense by {ReferencePassive2_EffectValue1}% for a limited time.

name: Silvegis
description: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces shield regeneration delay by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% and reduces damage taken by your shield by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Azurmane
description: Can be ridden. Grants Air Dash, to move at even higher speeds. {ReferenceMsgId_ShortDashSpeedCoolTime}

name: Valentail
description: While in party, reduces the effects of gravity on the player, making them more floaty while jumping and falling. (Does not stack)

name: Snock
description: While in party, the player's attacks inflict [EFFECT:Electrical] {Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Snock Lux
description: While in party, player and party Pals take {Passive1_EffectValue1}% less [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] damage, and are immune to [EFFECT:Wetness]. (Does not stack)

name: Souffline
description: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with [EFFECT:IvyCling]. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_CaptureRate}

name: Lapiron
description: While in party, increases the player's Defense by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% while sprinting. (Does not stack)

name: Hoodle
description: While in party, increases the player's damage dealt to enemies that are not in combat by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Slowatt
description: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with [EFFECT:Electrical], the enemy discharges electricity, dealing damage equal to {Passive1_EffectValue1}% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

name: Bakemi
description: While in party, attacking enemies afflicted with [EFFECT:Poison] reduces their Attack by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Solmora
description: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_SwimSpeedUp}

name: Solmora Lux
description: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Electric][ELEM:Electricity] and increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_SwimSpeedUp}

name: Lapure
description: While in party, reduces the Partner Skill cooldowns for other party Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue2}%. (Does not stack)

name: Eidrolon
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Dragon][ELEM:Dragon]or [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] Pal in your party.

name: Eidrolon Ignis
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% or each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Dragon][ELEM:Dragon] or [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] Pal in your party. (Excluding Eidrolon Ignis)

name: Dynamoff
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While at a base, shortens the time it takes to incubate eggs by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Tropicaw
description: While in party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps by {Passive1_EffectValue2}%. (Does not stack)

name: Flaracle
description: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with [EFFECT:Burn], the enemy explodes, dealing damage equal to {Passive1_EffectValue1}% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

name: Ophydia
description: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict [EFFECT:Wetness] {Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Dupin
description: While in party, when the player's Health falls below 50%, Dupin generates an explosion around the player ([ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] / Power: {Passive1_EffectValue1} / [EFFECT:Burn] buildup: {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}). Additionally, while the player's Health is below 50%, the player's Attack is increased by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Roujay
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with [EFFECT:Darkness] by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Venusa
description: While in party, the player's attacks inflict [EFFECT:Darkness] {Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Mycora
description: While at a base, increases the Product Medicine Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +{Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Loomen
description: While in party, the player's arrows explode on contact, dealing additional damage equal to {Passive1_EffectValue1}% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack)

name: Wistella
description: While in party, increases Defense of [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] Pals by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack)

name: Solenne
description: While in party, increases the player's Attack by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% if all Pals in party are different species. (Does not stack)

name: Renjishi
description: While in party, the player's attacks inflict [EFFECT:Burn] {Passive1_EffectValue1}. (Does not stack)

name: Aegidron
description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take {Passive1_EffectValue2}% less damage from explosive attacks, and are immune to [EFFECT:Stun]. (Does not stack)

name: Grizzbolt
description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Lyleen
description: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by {ActiveSkillMainValueByRank}%.

name: Lyleen Noct
description: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by {ActiveSkillMainValueByRank}%.

name: Orserk
description: While in party, hitting an enemy with a bullet increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for 5 seconds. This effect stacks up to 30 times. (Does not stack.)

name: Faleris
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Faleris Aqua
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, [ICON:ElemIcon_Fire][ELEM:Fire] Pals drop {Passive1_EffectValue1}% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Shadowbeak
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. Enhances [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] attacks by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% while mounted.

name: Selyne
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, enhances [ICON:ElemIcon_Neutral][ELEM:Normal] and [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark] attacks by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%.

name: Shaolong
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}% for each other [ICON:ElemIcon_Dragon][ELEM:Dragon] Pal in your party.

name: Silvance
description: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with [EFFECT:IvyCling], the enemy explodes, dealing additional damage equal to {Passive2_EffectValue1}% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack) Also grants immunity to the World Tree's Explosive Spores to both the player and their Pals.

name: Dandilord
description: When activated, the player's attacks inflict [EFFECT:Poison] {ReferencePassive1_EffectValue1}. While in party, grants the player and party Pals immunity to [EFFECT:Poison], and nullifies the effects of toxic gas in the World Tree area. (Does not stack)

name: Bellanoir
description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Ray. When this Pal uses Nightmare Ray, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier.

name: Bellanoir Libero
description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Bloom. When this Pal uses Nightmare Bloom, it has a x{ActiveSkillMainValueByRank} damage multiplier.

name: Xenolord
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, damage done by Partner Skills of weapon-wielding Pals increases by {Passive1_EffectValue1}%. (Does not stack) {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Hartalis
description: Can be ridden. While mounted, it generates a barrier that blocks all attacks. Can triple jump while mounted. {ReferenceMsgId_CooldownReduction}

name: Paladius
description: Can be ridden. Can triple jump while mounted. Activate Spear Thrust to have Necromus stay by your side and attack enemies in tandem. {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Necromus
description: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. When Twin Spears skill is activated, a Paladius in your party will appear and attack alongside you. {ReferenceMsgId_RideSpeedUp}

name: Frostallion
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Ice][ELEM:Ice], inflict [EFFECT:Freeze] {Passive3_EffectValue1}, increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Frostallion Noct
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to [ICON:ElemIcon_Dark][ELEM:Dark], inflict [EFFECT:Darkness] {Passive3_EffectValue1}, increases Attack by {Passive2_EffectValue1}%.

name: Neptilius
description: While in party, it follows up the player's attacks with [ICON:ElemIcon_Water][ELEM:Water] spear strikes. Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, it can leap high into the air over water. {ReferenceMsgId_SwimSpeedUp_CooldownReduction}

name: Jetragon
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Panthalus
description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Only 1 can be summoned to a base. While at a base, it constantly patrols the skies and bombards intruders from high above. {ReferenceMsgId_DamageUp}

name: Astralym
description: This Pal's abilities are still being investigated.
